subcodes.first_line: The Sun of Manifestation is risen, and the Ocean of bounty surgeth. Blessed are they who, with complete certitude, have turned unto the horizon of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آفتاب ظهور مشرق و دریای فضل مواج طوبی از برای نفوسیکه بکمال ایقان بافق رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
